summary: AI Chart Analyzer feature fully tested - backend API returns correct preset data, frontend displays upload zone, type selector, quantity table, contract preview, and PDF download button correctly

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <tr> and <span> nesting - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: N/A - uses preset data for stairs/foundation/walls
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chart Analyzer feature at /ai-chart is fully functional. Backend endpoint /api/ai-chart/analyze returns preset data for 3 chart types: stairs (grand_total=3528), foundation (10061), walls (5306). Frontend has all required elements with data-testid attributes. Navigation links in navbar dropdown and mobile menu show 'AI Чертежи'. The /api/ai-chart/analyze endpoint uses MOCKED/PRESET data for specific chart types, not real AI analysis.

POST /api/ai-chart/analyze with chart_type='Стени' - PASSED (returns walls data, grand_total=5306)
POST /api/ai-chart/analyze with empty image - PASSED (returns 400 error)
POST /api/ai-chart/analyze with auto type - PASSED (defaults to stairs)
Response contains complete contract data - PASSED
